## NS.getServerMaxMoney() method

Get the maximum money available on a server.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getServerMaxMoney(host?: string): number;
```

## Remarks

RAM cost: 0.1 GB

Returns the maximum amount of money that can be available on a server.
